title: Re:Enchantments
body:
## ReEnchantments

This mod adds multiple Vaniilla-styled enchantments into the game.

## List of enchantments

- **Experienced** [I-V] (Helmet) - Increases incoming EXP by +10%/level.
- **Vampirism** [I-II] (Sword) - Heal on killing non-baby mobs by 1 HP/level.
- **Midas Touch** [I] (Sword) - Entities drop a golden nugget on death. Treasure enchant.
- **Cripple** [I-III] (Sword) - Apply Slowness on hit that lasts 1sec*level.
- **Hermes Blessing** [I-V] (Boots) - Get extra speed while on full HP, 8% of walking speed/level.
